mapper.select: SELECT DEPT_CD, DEPT_NM FROM DEPARTMENT ORDER BY DEPT_CD ASC
SELECT DEPT_CD, DEPT_NM, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EMPLOYEE E WHERE E.DEPT_CD = D.DEPT_CD) AS DEPT_COUNT FROM DEPARTMENT D ORDER BY DEPT_CD ASC
SELECT DEPT_CD, DEPT_NM FROM DEPARTMENT ORDER BY DEPT_CD ASC
SELECT A.EMP_ID, A.EMP_NM, A.DEPT_CD, B.DEPT_NM FROM EMPLOYEE A LEFT OUTER JOIN DEPARTMENT B ON (A.DEPT_CD = B.DEPT_CD) WHERE A.EMP_STTS = 'Y'
SELECT A.EMP_ID, A.EMP_NM, A.DEPT_CD, B.DEPT_NM FROM EMPLOYEE A LEFT OUTER JOIN DEPARTMENT B ON (A.DEPT_CD = B.DEPT_CD) WHERE A.EMP_ID = #{empId} AND A.EMP_STTS = 'Y'
SELECT EMP_ID, EMP_NM, EMP_JBGD, EMP_ROLE, DEPT_CD, EMP_EML, EMP_PHONE, EMP_PROFILE FROM EMPLOYEE WHERE DEPT_CD = #{deptCd} AND EMP_ROLE = '팀장' AND EMP_STTS = 'Y'
SELECT EMP_ID, EMP_NM, EMP_JBGD, EMP_ROLE, DEPT_CD, EMP_EML, EMP_PHONE, EMP_PROFILE FROM EMPLOYEE WHERE DEPT_CD = #{deptCd} AND EMP_JBGD = '대리' AND EMP_STTS = 'Y'
SELECT EMP_ID, EMP_NM, EMP_JBGD, EMP_ROLE, DEPT_CD, EMP_EML, EMP_PHONE, EMP_PROFILE FROM EMPLOYEE WHERE DEPT_CD = #{deptCd} AND EMP_JBGD = '주임' AND EMP_STTS = 'Y'
SELECT EMP_ID, EMP_NM, EMP_JBGD, EMP_ROLE, DEPT_CD, EMP_EML, EMP_PHONE, EMP_PROFILE FROM EMPLOYEE WHERE DEPT_CD = #{deptCd} AND EMP_ROLE = '사원' AND EMP_STTS = 'Y'

SELECT E.EMP_ID, E.EMP_NM, E.EMP_JBGD, E.EMP_ROLE, E.DEPT_CD, E.EMP_EML, REGEXP_REPLACE(E.EMP_PHONE, '([0-9]{3})([0-9]{3,4})([0-9]{4})', '\1-\2-\3') AS EMP_PHONE, E.EMP_PROFILE, A.AVT_SAVE_NM FROM EMPLOYEE E LEFT OUTER JOIN EMP_AVT EA ON (E.EMP_ID = EA.EMP_ID AND EA.OWN_AVT_WEAR_YN = 'Y') LEFT OUTER JOIN AVATAR A ON (EA.AVT_NO = A.AVT_NO) WHERE E.DEPT_CD = #{deptCd} AND E.EMP_ROLE = '팀장' AND EMP_STTS = 'Y'

SELECT E.EMP_ID, E.EMP_NM, E.EMP_JBGD, E.EMP_ROLE, E.DEPT_CD, E.EMP_EML, REGEXP_REPLACE(E.EMP_PHONE, '([0-9]{3})([0-9]{3,4})([0-9]{4})', '\1-\2-\3') AS EMP_PHONE, E.EMP_PROFILE, A.AVT_SAVE_NM FROM EMPLOYEE E LEFT OUTER JOIN EMP_AVT EA ON (E.EMP_ID = EA.EMP_ID AND EA.OWN_AVT_WEAR_YN = 'Y') LEFT OUTER JOIN AVATAR A ON (EA.AVT_NO = A.AVT_NO) WHERE E.DEPT_CD = #{deptCd} AND E.EMP_ROLE = '사원' AND EMP_STTS = 'Y'
